rulings.Case Title: CHARLES ENGELBERG VS. ELLEN TSANG, AS TRUSTEE OF THE ARZA TRUST et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 05, 2015 line 1. DEFENDANT ELLEN TSANG, AS TRUSTEE OF THE ARZA TRUST's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT Overruled 10 days to answer. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges facts to support all elements of the cause of action for equitable easement. Factual issues presented by the Request for Judicial notice are not properly raised on a demurrer. Injunctive relief is an available remedy under the circumstances of this case. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAMUIL RAITER VS. MILLA VAYNTRUB et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reopen Discovery And Compel Further Responses By Plaintiff Samuil Raiter To Discovery Requests Of Defendant Milla Vayntrub
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 05, 2015 line 2. DEFENDANT MILLA VAYNTRUB's Motion To Reopen Discovery And Compel Further Responses By Plaintiff Samuil Raiter To Discovery Requests Of Defendant Milla Vayntrub GRANTED, in part, and DENIED, in part. Motion to Reopen Discovery is GRANTED. Discovery should remain open until June 13, 2015.Motion to Compel Further Responses is denied as untimely. See CCP 2030.250(a); 2030.300(c); Vidal Sasoon, Inc. v. Sup. Ct. (1983) 147 Cal.App.3d 681, 685. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JEFFREY P KANT VS. MARK S. ALBI AND ALL PERSONS UNKNOWN AND CLAIMING et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 05, 2015 line 4. PLAINTIFF JEFFREY KANT's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint DENIED. Plaintiff failed to comply with CRC 3.1324. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH WAKIM VS. FAY MALOUF VASSILAKIA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 05, 2015 line 6. DEFENDANTS FAY VASSILAKIA and LAMIS MALOUF's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Continued to June 4, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than may 8, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and proved courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than may 8, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE VS. ERIN WILEY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Verificatioins And Special Interrogatories From Defendant Erin Wiley, And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 05, 2015 line 9. PLAINTIFF BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE's Motion To Compel Verificatioins And Special Interrogatories From Defendant Erin Wiley, And Request For Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition. D shall (1) provide verifications to Special Interrogatories and Requests for Production and (2) provide substantive responses to Special Interrogatories 16, 19, and 22 within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $750. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CUIZHU YU VS. CAROLYN MCNEIL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion , Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Set Vacate Default And Judgment
